description_long: This is a DeWalt cordless electric drill, predominantly yellow and black, with a robust, ergonomic handle featuring textured rubber grips for secure handling. The drill has a compact, rectangular battery pack at the base, labeled '20V MAX XR', and a visible trigger button on the handle. The front section houses a metallic chuck with no drill bit attached, and the body displays several brand logos and technical labels. Ventilation slots are present on the upper sides of the main body for cooling. The rear of the drill is marked 'BRUSHLESS MOTOR', indicating advanced motor technology, and the overall build suggests durability for heavy-duty urban or workshop use.
description: A yellow and black DeWalt cordless electric drill with a textured grip, visible trigger, and a compact battery pack. The drill features brand logos, ventilation slots, and a metallic chuck with no bit attached.
description_view_0: Side view showing the DeWalt logo, battery pack, ergonomic handle, and the metallic chuck.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the 'BRUSHLESS MOTOR' label and the back of the handle and battery pack.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying technical labels, ventilation slots, and the battery pack.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the metallic chuck, absence of a drill bit, and the top of the battery pack.
